channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Research Papers
channel.description: Latest Research Papers news in Context Engineering

item.title: Toward Culturally Grounded Natural Language Processing
item.description: arXiv:2603.26013v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent progress in multilingual NLP is often taken as evidence of broader global inclusivity, but a growing literature shows that multilingual capability and cultural competence come apart. This paper synthesizes over 50 papers from 2020--2026 spannin...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, vision, multimodal, model, RAG | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: AutoB2G: A Large Language Model-Driven Agentic Framework For Automated Building-Grid Co-Simulation
item.description: arXiv:2603.26005v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The growing availability of building operational data motivates the use of reinforcement learning (RL), which can learn control policies directly from data and cope with the complexity and uncertainty of large-scale building clusters. However, most ex...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, large language model, framework, model, context | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: GUIDE: Resolving Domain Bias in GUI Agents through Real-Time Web Video Retrieval and Plug-and-Play Annotation
item.description: arXiv:2603.26266v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large vision-language models have endowed GUI agents with strong general capabilities for interface understanding and interaction. However, due to insufficient exposure to domain-specific software operation data during training, these agents exhibit s...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> instruction, arxiv, vision, framework, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: AIRA_2: Overcoming Bottlenecks in AI Research Agents
item.description: arXiv:2603.26499v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Existing research has identified three structural performance bottlenecks in AI research agents: (1) synchronous single-GPU execution constrains sample throughput, limiting the benefit of search; (2) a generalization gap where validation-based selecti...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, research, experiment, LLM | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: A Lightweight, Transferable, and Self-Adaptive Framework for Intelligent DC Arc-Fault Detection in Photovoltaic Systems
item.description: arXiv:2603.25749v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Arc-fault circuit interrupters (AFCIs) are essential for mitigating fire hazards in residential photovoltaic (PV) systems, yet achieving reliable DC arc-fault detection under real-world conditions remains challenging. Spectral interference from inve...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, framework, model, platform, experiment | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: In-Context Molecular Property Prediction with LLMs: A Blinding Study on Memorization and Knowledge Conflicts
item.description: arXiv:2603.25857v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The capabilities of large language models (LLMs) have expanded beyond natural language processing to scientific prediction tasks, including molecular property prediction. However, their effectiveness in in-context learning remains ambiguous, particula...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, large language model, paper, GPT, framework | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Data-Driven Plasticity Modeling via Acoustic Profiling
item.description: arXiv:2603.25894v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This paper presents a data-driven framework for modeling plastic deformation in crystalline metals through acoustic emission (AE) analysis. Building on experimental data from compressive loading of nickel micropillars, the study introduces a wavelet-b...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, framework, model, release, RAG | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Decoding Defensive Coverage Responsibilities in American Football Using Factorized Attention Based Transformer Models
item.description: arXiv:2603.25901v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Defensive coverage schemes in the National Football League (NFL) represent complex tactical patterns requiring coordinated assignments among defenders who must react dynamically to the offense's passing concept. This paper presents a factorized attent...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, attention, model, RAG, transformer | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Gradient-Informed Training for Low-Resource Multilingual Speech Translation
item.description: arXiv:2603.25836v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In low-resource multilingual speech-to-text translation, uniform architectural sharing across languages frequently introduces representation conflicts that impede convergence. This work proposes a principled methodology to automatically determine laye...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, analysis, alignment | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Methods for Knowledge Graph Construction from Text Collections: Development and Applications
item.description: arXiv:2603.25862v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Virtually every sector of society is experiencing a dramatic growth in the volume of unstructured textual data that is generated and published, from news and social media online interactions, through open access scholarly communications and observatio...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, platform, analysis, experiment, research | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 80%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: RealChart2Code: Advancing Chart-to-Code Generation with Real Data and Multi-Task Evaluation
item.description: arXiv:2603.25804v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities in code generation across various domains. However, their ability to replicate complex, multi-panel visualizations from real-world data remains largely unassessed. To address this...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, vision, model, release, analysis | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Empowering Epidemic Response: The Role of Reinforcement Learning in Infectious Disease Control
item.description: arXiv:2603.25771v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL), owing to its adaptability to various dynamic systems in many real-world scenarios and the capability of maximizing long-term outcomes under different constraints, has been used in infectious disease control to optimize the...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> API, arxiv, research, paper | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Stabilizing Rubric Integration Training via Decoupled Advantage Normalization
item.description: arXiv:2603.26535v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We propose Process-Aware Policy Optimization (PAPO), a method that integrates process-level evaluation into Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) through decoupled advantage normalization, to address two limitations of existing reward designs. Out...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> reasoning, arxiv, vision, model, experiment | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 40%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: DesignWeaver: Dimensional Scaffolding for Text-to-Image Product Design
item.description: arXiv:2502.09867v2 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Generative AI has enabled novice designers to quickly create professional-looking visual representations for product concepts. However, novices have limited domain knowledge that could constrain their ability to write prompts that effectively explor...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, product, tool, model, prompt | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 40%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: MAGNET: Autonomous Expert Model Generation via Decentralized Autoresearch and BitNet Training
item.description: arXiv:2603.25813v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present MAGNET (Model Autonomously Growing Network), a decentralized system for autonomous generation, training, and serving of domain-expert language models across commodity hardware. MAGNET integrates four components: (1) autoresearch, an autonom...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> arxiv, model, research | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 40%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)
